plugins.name: brand-demo
plugins.description: Brand the SE demo app for a prospect company from their website URL

installation.instructions: Install the brand-demo plugin from the marketplace

plugins.name: Code Reviewer
plugins.description: Performs comprehensive code reviews with security analysis, best practices, and improvement suggestions
plugins.longDescription:
Code Reviewer provides thorough code review capabilities directly in Claude Code. It analyzes your code for security vulnerabilities, adherence to best practices, potential bugs, and suggests improvements.

## Usage

Run `/review` to review staged changes, or `/review <file>` to review a specific file.

## Features

- Security vulnerability detection (OWASP Top 10)
- Best practices analysis
- Performance optimization suggestions
- Code style recommendations
- Complexity analysis

review.prompt: Review the specified code for security vulnerabilities, bugs, best practices violations, and potential improvements. Provide actionable feedback organized by severity.

installation.instructions: Add the following to your Claude Code settings.json under the 'skills' key

plugins.name: Commit Helper
plugins.description: Generates conventional commit messages based on staged changes with smart categorization
plugins.longDescription:
Commit Helper analyzes your staged git changes and generates well-formatted conventional commit messages. It automatically detects the type of change (feat, fix, docs, refactor, etc.) and creates descriptive commit messages following best practices.

## Usage

Simply run `/commit` after staging your changes, and the skill will analyze the diff and suggest an appropriate commit message.

## Features

- Automatic change type detection
- Conventional commit format
- Multi-file change summarization
- Breaking change detection

commit.description: Generate a conventional commit message for staged changes
commit.prompt: Analyze the staged git changes and generate a conventional commit message. Use the format: <type>(<scope>): <description>. Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore.

installation.instructions: Add the following to your Claude Code settings.json under the 'skills' key

plugins.name: customer-voice
plugins.description: Draft customer responses in your voice with optional codebase and docs research

installation.instructions: Install the customer-voice plugin from the marketplace

plugins.name: Doc Generator
plugins.description: Automatically generates documentation for functions, classes, and modules with JSDoc/docstring support
plugins.longDescription:
Doc Generator creates comprehensive documentation for your code. It analyzes functions, classes, and modules to generate accurate JSDoc comments, Python docstrings, or documentation in your preferred format.

## Usage

Run `/docs <file>` to generate documentation for a file, or `/docs` in a project to generate a documentation overview.

## Features

- Multi-language support (JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go)
- JSDoc and docstring generation
- README generation
- API documentation
- Example code generation

docs.prompt: Analyze the specified code and generate comprehensive documentation including function/method descriptions, parameter types, return values, and usage examples.

installation.instructions: Add the following to your Claude Code settings.json under the 'skills' key

plugins.name: Smart Test Runner
plugins.description: Intelligently runs relevant tests based on your code changes and provides detailed failure analysis
plugins.longDescription:
Smart Test Runner analyzes your recent code changes to determine which tests are most relevant and runs them automatically. When tests fail, it provides detailed analysis and suggestions for fixes.

## Usage

Run `/test` to automatically detect and run relevant tests, or `/test <pattern>` to run specific tests.

## Features

- Automatic test detection based on changed files
- Support for multiple test frameworks (Jest, Vitest, pytest, Go test)
- Detailed failure analysis with fix suggestions
- Coverage reporting integration

test.description: Run relevant tests for recent changes
test.prompt: Analyze recent code changes, identify relevant test files, and run appropriate tests. Provide detailed analysis of any failures with suggestions for fixes.

installation.instructions: Add the following to your Claude Code settings.json under the 'skills' key

plugins.name: workos-brand
plugins.description: Apply WorkOS design system branding and components when building UI

installation.instructions: Install the workos-brand plugin from the marketplace
